ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json var requiredFiles = ["ApptNotes", "HeaderData", "OrderMaterials"] var listKeys = vars.listObjects map $.key --- requiredFiles filter (reqFile) -> isEmpty(listKeys filter ((key) -> lower(key) contains lower(reqFile)))

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output text/plain --- "The following files are missing from the S3 bucket: " ++ (vars.missingFiles joinBy ", ")
